name: IdeaTrail: Full-Process Agent Trajectories for Scientific Ideation

description: arXiv:2607.10144v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Scientific ideation unfolds over multiple stages, including literature search, paper reading, tool use, claim checking, cross-paper synthesis, brainstorming, rejection of weak directions, and iterative writing. Yet most existing resources capture isolated components or final artifacts rather than the process connecting them. We introduce IdeaT...
author: Hengquan Guo
